name: Fine-Tune Model
description: Fine-tune or adapt a pretrained model with dataset inspection, dry run, training, evaluation, and Hub-ready packaging.

inputs.description: Base model identifier or local checkpoint.
Dataset identifier, local path, or data source.
Task type such as classification, language modeling, embedding, or instruction tuning.

permissions.description: Read model repository, dataset repository, model card, and dataset card metadata.

approval_points.description: Upload model weights, adapters, tokenizer, card, or evaluation results to the Hub.

phases.name: Goal And Base Model
phases.objective: Confirm target task, base model fit, license constraints, and success metric.

phases.name: Dataset Inspection
phases.objective: Load dataset source, capture revision, inspect splits, labels, examples, and privacy risks.

phases.name: Preprocessing And Config
phases.objective: Define tokenization, collator, label mapping, PEFT settings, training arguments, and metric function.

phases.name: Dry Run
phases.objective: Run a tiny batch through preprocessing, model forward pass, and evaluation wiring.

phases.name: Training
phases.objective: Run fine-tuning within budget and capture logs, checkpoints, metrics, and trainable parameter count.

phases.name: Evaluation And Error Analysis
phases.objective: Evaluate on held-out data, compare against baseline, and inspect representative errors.

phases.name: Packaging
phases.objective: Prepare model card, dataset references, evaluation results, and optional Hub publication.

required_outputs.description: Task, base model, dataset, metric, and constraints.
Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint.
Privacy, license, leakage, and quality risks.
Tokenizer, collator, label mapping, PEFT, TrainingArguments, and metric config.
Dry-run command, output, and exit status.
Training command, environment, and exit status.
Representative failure modes and data examples.

verifiers.description: Base model, license, and task compatibility are justified.
Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded.
Preprocessing, collator, label mapping, PEFT, trainer, and metric configuration are captured.
Dry run completes preprocessing, forward pass, and metric wiring.
Training and validation metrics include split, step or epoch, and run identifier.
Fine-tuned result is compared with a baseline or base model metric.
Model card includes intended use, limitations, datasets, training parameters, and evaluation results.
Final report claims cite recorded metrics, card metadata, logs, and artifacts.
